public|fn_pre_rview_opl_adpt_rslt||trigger|function||CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.fn_pre_rview_opl_adpt_rslt()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_total_cnt INT;
    v_rslt_cnt  INT;
    v_current_stat VARCHAR(10);
BEGIN
    -- adpt_rslt_cd가 변경된 경우에만 실행
    IF NEW.adpt_rslt_cd IS NOT NULL
       AND (OLD.adpt_rslt_cd IS NULL OR OLD.adpt_rslt_cd <> NEW.adpt_rslt_cd)
    THEN
        -- 사전검토완료가 아닌 경우에만 처리
        SELECT prgrs_stat_cd
          INTO v_current_stat
          FROM rp_pre_rview_mst
         WHERE wrk_mast_id = NEW.wrk_mast_id;

        IF v_current_stat <> 'RP070030' THEN
            -- 해당 사전검토의 전체 의견서 수
            SELECT COUNT(*)
              INTO v_total_cnt
              FROM rp_pre_rview_opl_list
             WHERE wrk_mast_id = NEW.wrk_mast_id;

            -- 채택결과가 등록된 의견서 수
            SELECT COUNT(*)
              INTO v_rslt_cnt
              FROM rp_pre_rview_opl_list
             WHERE wrk_mast_id = NEW.wrk_mast_id
               AND adpt_rslt_cd IS NOT NULL
               AND adpt_rslt_cd <> '';

            -- 모든 의견서에 결과가 등록되었으면 마스터 갱신
            IF v_total_cnt > 0 AND v_total_cnt = v_rslt_cnt THEN
                UPDATE rp_pre_rview_mst
                   SET opl_wrt_dt      = TO_CHAR(current_timestamp, 'YYYYMMDD')
                     , prgrs_stat_cd   = 'RP070030'
                     , fina_reg_pgm_id = 'SEB010'
                     , fina_reg_dts    = current_timestamp
                     , fina_reg_user_id = 'SYSTEM'
                     , fina_reg_ip     = '127.0.0.1'
                 WHERE wrk_mast_id     = NEW.wrk_mast_id;
            END IF;
        END IF;
    END IF;

    RETURN NEW;
END;
$function$

public|fn_pre_rview_opl_complete||trigger|function||CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.fn_pre_rview_opl_complete()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_incomplete_cnt INTEGER;
BEGIN
    -- adpt_rslt_cd가 변경된 경우에만 처리
    IF NEW.adpt_rslt_cd IS NOT NULL AND (OLD.adpt_rslt_cd IS NULL OR OLD.adpt_rslt_cd != NEW.adpt_rslt_cd) THEN

        -- 동일 wrk_mast_id에서 adpt_rslt_cd가 미입력된 건수 조회
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        INTO v_incomplete_cnt
        FROM rp_pre_rview_opl_list
        WHERE wrk_mast_id = NEW.wrk_mast_id
          AND (adpt_rslt_cd IS NULL OR adpt_rslt_cd = '');

        -- 모든 의견서가 채택결과 입력 완료 시 마스터 상태 갱신
        IF v_incomplete_cnt = 0 THEN
            UPDATE rp_pre_rview_mst
            SET prgrs_stat_cd = 'RP070030',
                fina_reg_pgm_id = 'SEB012',
                fina_reg_dts = current_timestamp,
                fina_reg_user_id = NEW.fina_reg_user_id,
                fina_reg_ip = NEW.fina_reg_ip
            WHERE wrk_mast_id = NEW.wrk_mast_id;
        END IF;

    END IF;

    RETURN NEW;
END;
$function$

public|fn_sy_get_biz_slip_seq|p_biz_slip_seq_tp character varying, p_wh_cd character varying, p_ym character varying, p_pgm_id character varying, p_user_id character varying, p_user_ip character varying|integer|function||CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.fn_sy_get_biz_slip_seq(p_biz_slip_seq_tp character varying, p_wh_cd character varying, p_ym character varying, p_pgm_id character varying, p_user_id character varying, p_user_ip character varying)
 RETURNS integer
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$ declare 
	 v_biz_slip_seq int;
	v_start_seq int;
	v_end_seq int;
BEGIN
	
	/*
	순번구분
	1 : 물류센터 거래명세서 수기 등록
	2 : 거래명세서 수기 등록
	3 : 매장교환(POS, RT)
	4 : 판매분 확정
	5 : 고객클레임
	6 : 시즌반품
	7 : 철수
	8 : 기타,조정(INC)
	
	교환일 경우 창고코드: 99 
	*/
	
	if    p_biz_slip_seq_tp = '1' then
        v_start_seq  :=  200001;
        v_end_seq  :=  299999;
	  elsif p_biz_slip_seq_tp = '2'then
	        v_start_seq  :=  300001;
	        v_end_seq  :=  399999;
	  elsif p_biz_slip_seq_tp = '3'then
	        v_start_seq  :=  400001;
	        v_end_seq  :=  599999;
	  elsif p_biz_slip_seq_tp = '4'then
	        v_start_seq  :=  500001;
	        v_end_seq  :=  599999;
	  elsif p_biz_slip_seq_tp = '5'then
	        v_start_seq  :=  600001;
	        v_end_seq  :=  699999;
	  elsif p_biz_slip_seq_tp = '6'then
	        v_start_seq  :=  700001;
	        v_end_seq  :=  799999;
	  elsif p_biz_slip_seq_tp = '7'then
	        v_start_seq  :=  800001;
	        v_end_seq  :=  899999;
	  else
	        v_start_seq  :=  900001;
	        v_end_seq  :=  999999;
	  end if;
	
	
    SELECT biz_slip_seq
    INTO v_biz_slip_seq
    FROM sy_biz_slip_seq_info
    WHERE biz_slip_seq_tp = p_biz_slip_seq_tp
    and wh_cd = p_wh_cd
    and ym = p_ym
    and biz_slip_seq >= v_start_seq
    and biz_slip_seq <= v_end_seq
    FOR UPDATE;
    
    IF NOT FOUND then
    
        v_biz_slip_seq := v_start_seq;
        INSERT INTO sy_biz_slip_seq_info (biz_slip_seq_tp
        , wh_cd
        , ym
        , biz_slip_seq
        , firs_reg_pgm_id
        , firs_reg_dts
        , firs_reg_user_id
        , firs_reg_ip)
        VALUES (p_biz_slip_seq_tp
       , p_wh_cd
       , p_ym
       , v_biz_slip_seq
       , p_pgm_id
       , current_timestamp
       , p_user_id
       , p_user_ip
       );
      
    ELSE
        
        v_biz_slip_seq := v_biz_slip_seq + 1;
       
        UPDATE sy_biz_slip_seq_info
        SET biz_slip_seq = v_biz_slip_seq
        , fina_reg_pgm_id = p_pgm_id
        , fina_reg_dts  = current_timestamp
        , fina_reg_user_id  = p_user_id
        , fina_reg_ip = p_user_ip
        WHERE biz_slip_seq_tp = p_biz_slip_seq_tp
	    and wh_cd = p_wh_cd
	    and ym = p_ym;
    END IF;

    RETURN v_biz_slip_seq;
	END; $function$

public|fn_sy_get_code_nm|p_wrk_tp_cd character varying, p_cd_tp_cd character varying, p_comm_cd character varying|character varying|function||CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.fn_sy_get_code_nm(p_wrk_tp_cd character varying, p_cd_tp_cd character varying, p_comm_cd character varying)
 RETURNS character varying
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_comm_cd_nm varchar(100);
BEGIN
    SELECT comm_cd_nm
    INTO v_comm_cd_nm
    FROM sy_code_dtl
    WHERE wrk_tp_cd = p_wrk_tp_cd
      AND cd_tp_cd = p_cd_tp_cd
      AND comm_cd = p_comm_cd;

    RETURN v_comm_cd_nm;
EXCEPTION
    WHEN NO_DATA_FOUND THEN
        RETURN null;
    WHEN TOO_MANY_ROWS THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'Query returned more than one row';
END;
$function$

public|fn_sy_get_code_nm_bank|p_wrk_tp_cd character varying, p_cd_tp_cd character varying, p_comm_cd character varying|character varying|function||CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.fn_sy_get_code_nm_bank(p_wrk_tp_cd character varying, p_cd_tp_cd character varying, p_comm_cd character varying)
 RETURNS character varying
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_comm_cd_nm VARCHAR(100);
BEGIN
    SELECT comm_cd_nm
    INTO v_comm_cd_nm
    FROM sy_code_dtl
    WHERE wrk_tp_cd = p_wrk_tp_cd
      AND cd_tp_cd = p_cd_tp_cd
      AND rel_comm_cd = p_comm_cd;

    RETURN v_comm_cd_nm;
EXCEPTION
    WHEN NO_DATA_FOUND THEN
        RETURN NULL;
    WHEN TOO_MANY_ROWS THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'Query returned more than one row';
END;
$function$

public|fn_sy_get_dept_nm|p_dept_cd character varying|character varying|function||CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.fn_sy_get_dept_nm(p_dept_cd character varying)
 RETURNS character varying
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_dept_nm varchar(30);
BEGIN
    SELECT dept_nm
    INTO v_dept_nm
    FROM sy_dept_info
    WHERE dept_cd = p_dept_cd;

    RETURN v_dept_nm;
EXCEPTION
    WHEN NO_DATA_FOUND THEN
        RETURN null;
    WHEN TOO_MANY_ROWS THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'Query returned more than one row';
END;
$function$

public|fn_sy_get_emp_dept_cd|p_emp_no character varying|character varying|function||CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.fn_sy_get_emp_dept_cd(p_emp_no character varying)
 RETURNS character varying
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_dept_cd varchar := '';
BEGIN
    SELECT dept_cd
    INTO v_dept_cd
    FROM sy_user_dept_info
    WHERE emp_no = p_emp_no;

    EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN v_dept_cd := '@@@@';

    RETURN v_dept_cd;
END;
$function$

public|fn_sy_get_file_path|p_file_id character varying|character varying|function||CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.fn_sy_get_file_path(p_file_id character varying)
 RETURNS character varying
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_file_path varchar(100);
    v_org_file_nm varchar(150);
    v_save_file_nm varchar(100);
BEGIN
    SELECT file_path, org_file_nm, save_file_nm
    INTO v_file_path, v_org_file_nm, v_save_file_nm
    FROM sy_file_info
    WHERE file_id = p_file_id;

    RETURN '/common/downloadImage?file_path=' || v_file_path || '&org_file_nm=' || v_org_file_nm || '&save_file_nm=' || v_save_file_nm;
EXCEPTION
    WHEN NO_DATA_FOUND THEN
        RETURN null;
    WHEN TOO_MANY_ROWS THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'Query returned more than one row';
END;
$function$

public|fn_sy_get_id|p_table_name character varying, p_column_name character varying, p_prefix character varying, p_total_length integer DEFAULT 20|character varying|function||CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.fn_sy_get_id(p_table_name character varying, p_column_name character varying, p_prefix character varying, p_total_length integer DEFAULT 20)
 RETURNS character varying
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_max_id VARCHAR;
    v_next_seq BIGINT;
    v_result_id VARCHAR;
BEGIN
    -- 1. 해당 접두어로 시작하는 가장 큰 ID 조회
    EXECUTE format(
        'SELECT MAX(%I) FROM %I WHERE %I LIKE %L',
        p_column_name, p_table_name, p_column_name, p_prefix || '%'
    ) INTO v_max_id;

    -- 2. 다음 번호 계산
    IF v_max_id IS NULL THEN
        v_next_seq := 1;
    ELSE
        v_next_seq := CAST(SUBSTRING(v_max_id FROM length(p_prefix) + 1) AS BIGINT) + 1;
    END IF;

    -- 3. 접두어와 일련번호 결합 (빈 자리는 '0'으로 채움)
    v_result_id := p_prefix || LPAD(v_next_seq::TEXT, p_total_length - length(p_prefix), '0');

    RETURN v_result_id;
END;
$function$

public|fn_sy_get_wrk_nm|p_wrk_tp_cd character varying|character varying|function||CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.fn_sy_get_wrk_nm(p_wrk_tp_cd character varying)
 RETURNS character varying
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE 
    v_wrk_tp_nm varchar(100);
BEGIN
    SELECT wrk_tp_nm
    INTO v_wrk_tp_nm 
    FROM sy_wrk_tp_info
    WHERE wrk_tp_cd = p_wrk_tp_cd;

    RETURN v_wrk_tp_nm;
EXCEPTION
    WHEN NO_DATA_FOUND THEN
        RETURN null; 
    WHEN TOO_MANY_ROWS THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'Query returned more than one row';
END;
$function$

public|fn_sy_log_events||event_trigger|function||CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.fn_sy_log_events()
 RETURNS event_trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO sy_event_logs (
    event_type,
    command_tag,
    object_id,
    object_name,
    schema_name,
    user_name
  )
  SELECT
    tg_event,
    tg_tag,
    objid,
    object_identity,
    schema_name,
    current_user
  FROM pg_event_trigger_ddl_commands();
END;
$function$

public|fn_sy_procedure_batch_exec|p_exec_no character varying|text|function||CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.fn_sy_procedure_batch_exec(p_exec_no character varying)
 RETURNS text
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_exec_proc_id varchar;
    v_proc_nm varchar;
    v_exec_vrbl_desc varchar;
    v_wrk_rmk varchar;
    v_req_pgm_id varchar;
    v_req_user_id varchar;
    v_req_ip varchar;
    v_cnt int;

    w_exec_cmd TEXT := '';
    w_err_msg VARCHAR := '';
BEGIN
    SELECT sbpe.exec_proc_id,
           sbpl.proc_nm,
           sbpe.exec_vrbl_desc,
           coalesce(sbpe.wrk_rmk, ''),
           coalesce(sbpe.req_pgm_id, ''),
           coalesce(sbpe.req_user_id, ''),
           coalesce(sbpe.req_ip, '')
    INTO v_exec_proc_id,
         v_proc_nm,
         v_exec_vrbl_desc,
         v_wrk_rmk,
         v_req_pgm_id,
         v_req_user_id,
         v_req_ip
    FROM sy_batch_pgm_exec sbpe
    JOIN sy_batch_pgm_list sbpl ON (sbpe.exec_proc_id = sbpl.proc_id)
    WHERE sbpe.exec_no = p_exec_no;

    BEGIN
        v_exec_vrbl_desc := v_exec_vrbl_desc || '#@#' || v_req_pgm_id || '#@#' || v_req_user_id || '#@#' || v_req_ip;

        w_exec_cmd := fn_sy_procedure_cmd(v_exec_proc_id, string_to_array(v_exec_vrbl_desc, '#@#'));

        RETURN w_exec_cmd;
    END;
END;
$function$

public|fn_sy_procedure_cmd|p_proc character varying, p_param character varying[]|character varying|function||CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.fn_sy_procedure_cmd(p_proc character varying, p_param character varying[])
 RETURNS character varying
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
	DECLARE w_type VARCHAR[];
	DECLARE w_cmd TEXT;
	DECLARE w_param VARCHAR := '';
BEGIN
	-- 프로시저 인자값 타입조회
	BEGIN
		SELECT ARRAY(
			SELECT
				format_type(unnest(proargtypes), NULL) INTO w_type
			FROM pg_proc prc inner join pg_namespace spc on prc.pronamespace = spc.oid
			WHERE spc.nspname = 'sjerp'
			AND prc.proname = p_proc
			AND prc.prokind = 'p'
		);
	END;
	
	FOR i IN 1..array_length(w_type, 1) LOOP
		w_param := w_param || format(',%L::%s', p_param[i], w_type[i]);
	END LOOP;
	
	w_cmd := format('CALL %I(%s);', p_proc, substr(w_param, 2));	
	RETURN w_cmd;
END;
$function$

public|tds_fdw_handler||fdw_handler|function||CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.tds_fdw_handler()
 RETURNS fdw_handler
 LANGUAGE c
 STRICT
AS '$libdir/tds_fdw', $function$tds_fdw_handler$function$

public|tds_fdw_validator|text[], oid|void|function||CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.tds_fdw_validator(text[], oid)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE c
 STRICT
AS '$libdir/tds_fdw', $function$tds_fdw_validator$function$

fn_pre_rview_opl_adpt_rslt||trigger
fn_pre_rview_opl_complete||trigger
fn_sy_get_biz_slip_seq|p_biz_slip_seq_tp character varying, p_wh_cd character varying, p_ym character varying, p_pgm_id character varying, p_user_id character varying, p_user_ip character varying|integer
fn_sy_get_code_nm|p_wrk_tp_cd character varying, p_cd_tp_cd character varying, p_comm_cd character varying|character varying
fn_sy_get_code_nm_bank|p_wrk_tp_cd character varying, p_cd_tp_cd character varying, p_comm_cd character varying|character varying
fn_sy_get_dept_nm|p_dept_cd character varying|character varying
fn_sy_get_emp_dept_cd|p_emp_no character varying|character varying
fn_sy_get_file_path|p_file_id character varying|character varying
fn_sy_get_id|p_table_name character varying, p_column_name character varying, p_prefix character varying, p_total_length integer DEFAULT 20|character varying
fn_sy_get_wrk_nm|p_wrk_tp_cd character varying|character varying
fn_sy_log_events||event_trigger
fn_sy_procedure_batch_exec|p_exec_no character varying|text
fn_sy_procedure_cmd|p_proc character varying, p_param character varying[]|character varying
